_meta.note: Machine-seeded Wave 13-14. Real translated strings in native script. Human review required before ratification.

speakFriend.title: Badia mukwasha, nena.
speakFriend.description: Liana Banyan yazengwa kuza yafunguka mu zilimi zonse. Lulimi lonse lufunguka lunawo muswapo umwi wa kusoselela.
speakFriend.provisionalNotice: Ulupungu wa zilimi na miimo ya Marks ni ya nkabalenshi. Marks fitambwa fya kukabila, ne fyabufi.
speakFriend.bountyDescription: Soselela Liana Banyan mu {{language}}. Poka {{marks}} Marks.
speakFriend.speakFounderTitle: Inshimi ya Mwine: Ifi Fyena Ifyebo
speakFriend.speakFounderDesc: Ubupyali bonse bwa platform yi bafilwe ishina pa mulandu. Ipapatilo lya malambo 26.
speakFriend.step1Body: Fungula Muswapo wa Kusoselela ku Help Wanted.
speakFriend.step2Body: Soselela imipalamino yonse. Tuma ku Bounty Poster.
speakFriend.step3Body: Peshya yakibilwa, mupoka Marks na ukuwandika ku IP Ledger.
speakFriend.subtitle: "Bela muntunsumba, kaba."

languageSwitcher.tip: Umishindo ya zilimi ishindwa ku Mwango wa Durin poka ifyafisomwa fya lwakwa!
